title: Singing Sensation
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo becomes a singing star on Mouse Island Idol, then teams up with detective Hercule to catch a cat pirate stealing his music! 🎤

q.en: What TV show did Champ sign Geronimo up for?
q.zh: 钱普帮杰罗尼摩报名参加了什么电视比赛？

explain.en: After hearing Geronimo sing in the shower, Champ signed him up for Mouse Island Idol, a show to find the best squeaker.
explain.zh: 钱普听到杰罗尼摩在洗澡时唱歌，就帮他报名了老鼠岛偶像大赛，那是选出最佳歌喉的节目。

options.zh: 杰罗尼摩那位超级健壮、爱运动的朋友

options.en: The owner of a music store

explain.en: Champ is Geronimo's super-fit, energetic friend who loves endurance sports like cycling and marathons.
explain.zh: 钱普是杰罗尼摩那位超级健壮、精力充沛的朋友，他热爱骑车和马拉松等耐力运动。

q.en: What was the name of the song Geronimo sang on the show?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在比赛上唱的那首歌叫什么名字？

options.en: The Curse of the Cheese Pyramid

explain.en: A songwriter at Mousey Records wrote 'Welcome to New Mouse City' especially for Geronimo to perform.
explain.zh: 鼠城唱片公司的一位词曲作者专门为杰罗尼摩写了《欢迎来到新鼠城》让他演唱。

q.en: Who helped Geronimo when he froze with a 'tongue cramp' on stage?
q.zh: 当杰罗尼摩在台上因为“舌头抽筋”僵住时，是谁帮了他？

explain.en: Benjamin came to Geronimo's side and began singing, and Geronimo joined in loud and clear with him.
explain.zh: 本杰明来到杰罗尼摩身边开始唱歌，杰罗尼摩也跟着他大声清楚地唱了起来。

q.en: What is the name of the cat pirate who stole Geronimo's CD?
q.zh: 偷走杰罗尼摩唱片的猫海盗叫什么名字？

explain.en: The Musical Pirate was Pussycat Pulverizer, a cat who copied stolen CDs in his black camper.
explain.zh: 那位音乐海盗就是猫咪粉碎者，他在一辆黑色房车里复制偷来的唱片。

q.en: What unusual feature does Pussycat Pulverizer have?
q.zh: 猫咪粉碎者有什么特别的特征？

options.en: His right paw is made of steel

explain.en: The book's profile of P.P. says his right paw is made out of steel, and Geronimo saw the steel paw.
explain.zh: 书中对猫咪粉碎者的介绍说他右爪是钢做的，杰罗尼摩也亲眼见到了那只钢爪。

q.zh: 猫咪粉碎者的弱点在哪？

explain.en: The book lists P.P.'s weakness as black licorice chewing gum.
explain.zh: 书中把黑色甘草口香糖列为猫咪粉碎者的弱点。

q.en: What vehicle did the cats use to escape at the end?
q.zh: 最后那些猫是用什么交通工具逃走的？

explain.en: The cats escaped in a black submarine marked Cruelcat Express as it sank into the waves.
explain.zh: 那些猫乘坐一艘标有“残暴猫快线”的黑色潜水艇沉入海浪中逃走了。

q.en: Who is Geronimo's editorial assistant who helped with his look?
q.zh: 谁是为杰罗尼摩打理造型的编辑助理？

explain.en: Champ assigned Pinky Pick, Geronimo's brainy editorial assistant, to help him try out new looks.
explain.zh: 钱普让杰罗尼摩聪明的编辑助理平基·皮克帮他尝试各种新造型。

q.en: What did Geronimo publish about his pirate adventure?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩把自己的冒险经历写成什么发表了？

options.en: A special edition of The Rodent's Gazette

explain.en: Geronimo rushed to the office and printed a special edition of The Rodent's Gazette about the pirate plot.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩冲进报社，赶印了一期《鼠民公报》特刊，报道猫海盗的阴谋。
